import { React, useState, useEffect} from 'react' import { Link, useParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import Container from '@mui/material/Container'; import Grid from '@mui/material/Grid'; import Button from '@mui/material/Button'; import Box from '@mui/material/Box'; import useApi from '../hooks/useApi'; const Book = () => { const { bookData } = useApi() const { id } = useParams() const bookDetails = bookData.find(book => book.id === id) || {}; const navigate = useNavigate(); return ( <>

{ bookDetails.volumeInfo.title }

{ bookDetails.volumeInfo.authors }

{ [bookDetails.volumeInfo.publishedDate].slice(0,4) }

{ bookDetails.volumeInfo.publisher}

{ bookDetails.volumeInfo.description }

Usuarios con este libro
  • Juan Perez - Liniers (a 2km)
  • Laura Gomez - CABA (a 4km)
  • Roberto Fernandez - Morón (a 6km)
 ) } export default Book
